hub_subtitle: Medical English to welcome guests and present with confidence

lesson.menu_title: Who Is Graziele? Diagnostic & First Hello
lesson.menu_desc: Welcoming a guest and introducing yourself at the hospital -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- Diagnostic Session and First Hello in English
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Graziele Dias | Aula 1 -- Diagnostic

listenings.text: Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the medical group meeting. Today we talk about the cardiology team and new projects for the hospital. We have a special guest today, a doctor from another country. Please say your name and your role at the start. The meeting is on Zoom, so speak slowly and clearly. Thank you, and welcome.

Hi Graziele, this is a quick message before the meeting. We have a guest today, a doctor from the United States. He is very kind. Please welcome him and say your name and your role. You are the coordinator now, so you start the meeting. Good luck, and see you on Zoom.

extra_audio.text: Graziele welcomes the guest to the meeting. She says her name and her role. Doctor Carter says he is a doctor from the United States. They talk about the medical group. They say nice to meet you and start the meeting.
